metadata.title: Loverboy
metadata.album: Here You Are: The Best of Billy Ocean
metadata.lyrics:
[00:46.06] I don't know what you've got

[01:22.66] Wanna be your lover, lover, lover boy
[01:28.67] Lover, lover, yeah
[01:31.47] Wanna be your lover, lover, lover boy
[01:45.73] Too far gone, it's hard to stop
[01:49.80] Baby, you're my dream in motion
[01:52.13] And I won't give up
[01:53.80] Hmm, teasing me
[01:56.72] With your fire
[01:59.03] My finger's on the trigger
[02:01.14] You're the one I desire
[02:02.74] 'Cause I got this feeling, feeling

[02:07.36] Got to have your tenderness
[02:09.88] All to myself
[02:11.96] I say, yeah, yeah, yeah-yeah
[02:18.19] I wanna be your lover, lover, mm

[02:35.34] Ooh, yeah

[02:56.87] Lo-lo-lover

[03:15.66] But the thing is there's nothing I can say
[03:18.45] To stop you, darling
[03:19.94] From running, running away
[03:22.80] Won't you stay, stay, stay?
[03:29.56] I wanna be your (lover, lover), yeah
[03:33.91] I wanna be your (lover, lover)
[03:37.47] I wanna be your love (ooh-ah, ooh-ah)
